home.tagline: The Platform That Learns With You
home.mission: Democratizing learning is not a feature. It's not a pricing model. It is the architecture of everything we build. If you can reach the platform, the platform should be able to reach you.
home.footer: Your space. Every skill. For everyone. A solution by Afflatus Consulting Group.

hero.subheadline: OmniLearn is not another LMS. It is a living learning space — designed from the ground up to mirror the way real professionals actually acquire, apply, and share knowledge. One platform. Every way to learn.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.byline: Democratize Learning. Period. A solution by Afflatus Consulting Group.

enterprise.title: Build Your Company Academy
enterprise.subtitle: Transform your workforce with a branded, internal learning platform. Nexus gives your organization its own academy — complete with private content, employee analytics, SSO, and custom branding — powered by the full OmniLearn library.
enterprise.ctaHeadline: Ready to launch your enterprise academy?
enterprise.ctaBody: Join forward-thinking organizations that trust OmniLearn Nexus to upskill their teams at scale. Live demos and pilot programs available.

story.title: The World Has a Learning Problem
story.problem: The global learning ecosystem is broken in a way that hides in plain sight. Knowledge exists — in abundance. But it is scattered across platforms, locked behind paywalls, buried in jargon, stripped of context, and disconnected from the real work people do every day. The people who need it most — professionals building careers, teams driving operations, organizations striving for compliance and excellence — are left to assemble their own education from scraps.
story.conclusion: At Afflatus Consulting Group, we saw this not as a technology gap, but as a justice gap. And we decided to close it.

bento.title: One Platform. Every Way to Learn.
bento.subtitle: Designed from the ground up to mirror the way real professionals actually acquire, apply, and share knowledge.
bento.aiPathsDesc: Deep, expert-led programs that build mastery over time. Each course is designed by practitioners — not academics in isolation — and structured to deliver measurable competence.
bento.multiTenantDesc: Not everyone has an hour. Sometimes the most powerful learning moment is five minutes between calls. Focused, actionable insights in bite-sized formats — learn at 9 AM, apply by noon.
bento.scormDesc: Expert voices for your commute, workout, or morning coffee. Industry leaders, case studies, and practical discussions — in your ears, on your schedule.
bento.microlearningDesc: Knowledge without application is decoration. Step-by-step guides, templates, SOPs, checklists — learning that works on Monday morning.
bento.gamificationDesc: Achievement systems, progress streaks, challenges, leaderboards — not as gimmicks, but as genuine motivational architecture. The hardest part of learning isn't starting. It's continuing.
bento.socialLearningDesc: Peer discussion forums, collaborative projects, expert Q&A, mentorship. When one person learns, the whole network gets smarter.

domains.title: Domain Expertise
domains.subtitle: Purpose-built training from practitioners who have implemented the systems they teach — in real organizations, under real constraints, with real results.

trending.title: See What's Trending
trending.subtitle: Explore what professionals are learning right now — courses, micro-learnings, and podcasts updated daily.
trending.microDesc: Short videos to learn on the go
trending.podcastsDesc: Listen and learn on the go

cta.headline: Join the Space
cta.subtitle: OmniLearn.space is more than a URL. It is an invitation — to organizations tired of training that doesn't stick, to L&D leaders who want their people to thrive, and to professionals who refuse to stop growing.

terms.intro: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of OmniLearn.space ("Platform"), operated by Afflatus Consulting Group. By accessing or using the Platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, you may not use our services. Last updated: March 2026.
terms.section1Content: By creating an account, accessing, or using OmniLearn.space, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. If you are using the Platform on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.
terms.section2Content: To access certain features, you must register for an account using a valid email address or Google authentication. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use. OmniLearn reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
terms.section3Content: You agree to use the Platform solely for lawful purposes. You must not: (a) copy, distribute, or publicly display content without permission; (b) attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or hack any part of the Platform; (c) upload malicious code or interfere with the Platform's operation; (d) impersonate another user or entity; (e) use automated tools to scrape or extract data.
terms.section4Content: OmniLearn offers multiple subscription tiers: Explorer (Free), Specialist, Visionary, and Nexus (Enterprise). Paid plans are billed monthly or annually. You may cancel at any time, and your access continues until the end of the billing period. Refunds are provided in accordance with applicable consumer protection laws. Enterprise (Nexus) contracts are governed by separate agreements.
terms.section5Content: All content on OmniLearn.space — including courses, videos, podcasts, documents, implementation guides, and software — is the intellectual property of Afflatus Consulting Group or its licensors. Your subscription grants a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access content for personal or organizational learning purposes only.
terms.section6Content: By posting reviews, forum topics, or other user-generated content, you grant OmniLearn a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute your content within the Platform. You retain ownership of your content and may delete it at any time. We reserve the right to moderate or remove content that violates our community guidelines.
terms.section7Content: OmniLearn.space is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Afflatus Consulting Group shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Platform. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.
terms.section8Content: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or a prominent notice on the Platform. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. For questions about these Terms, please contact us at legal@omnilearn.space.

privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how OmniLearn.space, operated by Afflatus Consulting Group, collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information. We are committed to safeguarding your privacy and complying with applicable data protection regulations including GDPR and CCPA. Last updated: March 2026.
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly: name, email address, organization details, and profile information during registration. We also collect usage data automatically: learning progress, content interactions, quiz scores, time spent, device information, IP address, and browser type. For enterprise customers, we may receive user data through SCIM provisioning from your identity provider.
privacy.section2Content: We use your data to: (a) provide and personalize your learning experience; (b) power AI-driven content recommendations and learning path suggestions; (c) track progress, issue certificates, and manage gamification rewards; (d) communicate account-related information and platform updates; (e) improve our platform and develop new features; (f) comply with legal obligations and enforce our Terms.
privacy.section3Content: OmniLearn uses machine learning models (including embedding-based recommendations) to personalize your experience. Your learning patterns, preferences, and progress data may be used to train and improve these models. We do not use your personal data for purposes unrelated to the Platform. You may opt out of personalized recommendations in your account settings.
privacy.section4Content: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with: (a) service providers who assist in operating the Platform (hosting, email, payment processing); (b) your employer or organization if you are on an enterprise plan; (c) law enforcement when required by law. All third-party providers are contractually obligated to protect your data.
privacy.section5Content: We retain your data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide services. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting privacy@omnilearn.space. We will process deletion requests within 30 days, subject to legal retention requirements.
privacy.section6Content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS), secure password hashing (bcrypt), JWT-based authentication, and regular security audits. Enterprise customers benefit from additional security features including SSO integration, SCIM provisioning, and role-based access control.
privacy.section7Content: Depending on your jurisdiction, you have the right to: access your personal data; correct inaccurate data; request deletion; object to or restrict processing; data portability; and withdraw consent. To exercise these rights, contact privacy@omnilearn.space. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.section8Content: For privacy-related inquiries: Data Protection Officer, Afflatus Consulting Group, privacy@omnilearn.space. For general inquiries: hello@omnilearn.space. We are committed to resolving any concerns about our data practices.

about.intro: OmniLearn.space is the platform that learns with you. Built by Afflatus Consulting Group to democratize professional learning for everyone — from frontline workers to C-suite executives, from emerging startups to global enterprises.
about.section1Content: Democratizing learning is not a feature. It's not a pricing model. It is the architecture of everything we build. We believe that access to high-quality professional development should be a right, not a reward. OmniLearn brings structured courses, micro-learning, podcasts, implementation guides, gamification, and social learning into one unified space — making it possible for anyone, anywhere, to develop real-world skills.
about.section2Content: Afflatus Consulting Group brings years of frontline experience in consulting, auditing, training, and organizational transformation across industries. We've trained thousands of professionals in food safety, quality management, operational excellence, and leadership. Every feature in OmniLearn was born from a real problem we encountered in the field — not from a whiteboard in a Silicon Valley office.
about.section3Content: The global learning ecosystem is broken in a way that hides in plain sight. Knowledge exists — in abundance. But it is scattered across platforms, locked behind paywalls, buried in jargon, stripped of context, and disconnected from the real work people do every day. Traditional LMS platforms treat learning as a checkbox exercise. We treat it as a continuous, living process.
about.section4Content: OmniLearn is not another LMS. It is a living learning space designed from the ground up to mirror the way real professionals actually acquire, apply, and share knowledge. We combine AI-driven personalization, structured curriculum design, social learning, and practical implementation tools. Our platform adapts to each learner's pace, preferences, and professional context.
about.section5Content: Whether you're an individual professional seeking to advance your career, or an enterprise L&D leader building a culture of continuous development, OmniLearn adapts to your needs. Individual plans start free. Enterprise solutions include dedicated academies, SCIM provisioning, SSO integration, advanced analytics, and white-label branding.
about.section6Content: Accessibility — learning should reach everyone. Quality — content created by practitioners, not just academics. Application — knowledge without implementation is decoration. Community — when one person learns, the whole network gets smarter. Integrity — we earn trust through transparency and results.

whatWeOffer.intro: OmniLearn.space offers a comprehensive learning ecosystem designed for real professionals. One platform, every way to learn — structured to deliver measurable outcomes for individuals and organizations alike.
whatWeOffer.section1Content: Deep, expert-led programs designed by practitioners who have implemented the systems they teach. Each course features video lectures, quizzes, coding exercises, downloadable resources, and completion certificates. Our Udemy-style course builder supports sections, sessions, and practical activities — giving trainers full control over curriculum design.
whatWeOffer.section2Content: Not everyone has an hour. Sometimes the most powerful learning moment is five minutes between meetings. Our micro-learning feed delivers focused, actionable insights in bite-sized video and text formats — designed to be consumed on any device. Learn at 9 AM, apply by noon.
whatWeOffer.section3Content: Expert voices for your commute, workout, or morning coffee. Industry leaders, case studies, and practical discussions — available in your ears, on your schedule. Our podcast player supports variable speed playback, transcripts, and bookmarking.
whatWeOffer.section4Content: Knowledge without application is decoration. Our implementation guides provide step-by-step instructions, downloadable templates, SOPs, and checklists — learning that works on Monday morning. Each guide is designed to bridge the gap between theory and practice.
whatWeOffer.section5Content: Achievement systems, progress streaks, challenges, and leaderboards — not as gimmicks, but as genuine motivational architecture. The hardest part of learning isn't starting — it's continuing. Points, badges, and streaks keep learners engaged and accountable.
whatWeOffer.section6Content: Peer discussion forums, collaborative projects, expert Q&A, and mentorship. Our forum system supports channels, topics, moderation, and pinned content. When one person shares an insight, the whole network benefits.
whatWeOffer.section7Content: Our intelligence engine uses machine learning and vector embeddings to recommend the right content to the right learner at the right time. Semantic search, personalized path suggestions, and predictive analytics help both learners and L&D teams optimize outcomes.
whatWeOffer.section8Content: For organizations, OmniLearn offers dedicated enterprise academies with private content libraries, SCIM user provisioning, SSO integration, custom branding, advanced analytics, seat management, and compliance tracking. Build your company's learning culture on our infrastructure.

press.intro: Press and media resources for OmniLearn.space and Afflatus Consulting Group. We welcome inquiries from journalists, analysts, and partners.
press.section1Content: OmniLearn.space is a next-generation learning platform built by Afflatus Consulting Group. Launched in 2025, OmniLearn serves individual professionals and enterprise organizations with structured courses, micro-learning, podcasts, implementation guides, gamification, and AI-powered recommendations. The platform operates on a freemium model with four tiers: Explorer (Free), Specialist, Visionary, and Nexus (Enterprise).
press.section2Content: Our brand assets including logos, color palette specifications, and typography guidelines are available upon request. The OmniLearn brand uses a nature-inspired palette: Emerald Green (#059669), Sand (#D4B896), Warm Beige (#F5F5DC), and Deep Forest (#0f1510). Please contact press@omnilearn.space for the full media kit.
press.section3Content: We announce product launches, partnerships, and company milestones through our press channel. Subscribe to press@omnilearn.space for updates, or follow Afflatus Consulting Group on LinkedIn for the latest news.
press.section4Content: For press inquiries, interviews, partnership opportunities, or speaking engagements, please contact our communications team at press@omnilearn.space. We aim to respond to all media inquiries within 24 hours.

contact.intro: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you're exploring OmniLearn for your team, have a technical question, or want to discuss a partnership, our team is ready to help.
contact.section1Content: For questions about OmniLearn.space, our platform capabilities, pricing, or how we can help your organization build a culture of continuous learning, reach out at hello@omnilearn.space. Our team typically responds within one business day.
contact.section2Content: For organizations interested in the Nexus Enterprise plan, dedicated academy setup, volume licensing, or custom integrations, contact our sales team at sales@omnilearn.space or use the enterprise inquiry form on this page. We offer live demos and pilot programs.
contact.section3Content: Existing customers can access support through their account dashboard. For technical issues, platform access problems, or integration help, contact support@omnilearn.space. Enterprise customers have access to priority support with dedicated account managers.
contact.section4Content: We partner with industry experts, training providers, and consultancies to expand our content library. If you're interested in publishing content on OmniLearn or establishing a training partnership with Afflatus Consulting Group, contact partners@omnilearn.space.
contact.section5Content: Afflatus Consulting Group — the team behind OmniLearn.space. Reach us at hello@omnilearn.space for any inquiry not covered above.

modernSlavery.intro: OmniLearn.space and Afflatus Consulting Group are committed to conducting business ethically and with integrity. This Modern Slavery Statement is made pursuant to applicable modern slavery legislation and sets out the steps we take to prevent modern slavery and human trafficking in our business and supply chains.
modernSlavery.section1Content: We are committed to ensuring that modern slavery, human trafficking, forced labor, and child labor have no place in our operations or supply chains. We expect the same commitment from all our partners, suppliers, and contractors. We recognize that modern slavery is a global issue that requires vigilance and proactive measures.
modernSlavery.section2Content: Afflatus Consulting Group operates primarily in the professional services and technology sectors. Our supply chain includes technology infrastructure providers, cloud hosting services, payment processors, and content creation partners. We assess the modern slavery risk within our supply chain as part of our vendor onboarding and review processes.
modernSlavery.section3Content: We conduct due diligence on new suppliers and review existing suppliers on a periodic basis. Our risk assessment considers factors such as geographic location, industry sector, and the nature of the labor involved. High-risk suppliers are subject to enhanced due diligence and may be required to provide evidence of their own anti-slavery policies.
modernSlavery.section4Content: We maintain a code of conduct that explicitly prohibits modern slavery practices. All employees are made aware of our policies and their responsibility to report any concerns. We encourage the reporting of any suspected modern slavery through our confidential reporting channels. We review and update this statement annually.
modernSlavery.section5Content: If you suspect or become aware of any modern slavery practices related to our business, please report it immediately to ethics@omnilearn.space. All reports will be investigated promptly and in confidence. No person will be penalized for raising a concern in good faith.
